overall.description: A vehicle drives along a winding mountain road in a driving simulator game, featuring rocky cliff faces, forested hillsides, and scattered rural buildings. The scene is set on a clear sunny day with bright natural lighting. The vehicle encounters and passes a white van before continuing past small roadside structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with steep rock face

events.description: white van appears on the left side of the road, driving in opposite direction

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding mountain road, hugging the right side near the cliff face

notable_agents.action: white van driving in opposite direction, passing by at the end of the segment

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall running alongside the right side of the road
green tree-covered hillside rising on the left side of the valley
narrow paved mountain road with white lane markings
rocky mountain summit visible above the tree line

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a narrow mountain road carved into a steep rock face on the right, with a forested mountainside rising on the left. The road curves gently through the valley under clear blue skies. A white van appears in the left lane, driving in the opposite direction.

events.description: rural buildings become visible in the distance on the left side of the valley

agents.ego_description: continuing along the mountain road after passing the van, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: cluster of light-colored buildings nestled in the valley below the forested slope

segments.scene_description: After passing the van, the vehicle continues along the winding road with the rocky cliff face now slightly further to the right. Rural buildings become visible in the distance on the left, nestled among the trees in the valley below.

events.description: slight right curve as the road bends around the mountainside

agents.ego_description: approaching a small building on the right side of the road while driving along the curve

entered.detail: small peach-colored house with dark roof on the right side of the road
low building with roll-up door attached to the small house

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a small peach-colored building with an attached garage on the right side of the road. The rocky cliff face draws closer again on the right, while the distant rural buildings on the left become more defined. The road continues to curve through the mountainous terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing roadside building on mountain curve

events.description: passing the small pink building on the right, view opens to more forested valley

agents.ego_description: passing the small building on the right and continuing along the left-curving road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes the small pink building and its garage structure, which fall behind on the right. The road curves left through dense forest, with the rocky cliff face still present on the right and lush green vegetation filling the valley on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a winding mountain road that transitions from an open valley pass into a densely forested corridor. It begins with the vehicle navigating a narrow path between a steep rock face and a rising forested mountainside, passing a white van traveling in the opposite direction. As the van recedes, the road curves further, revealing distant rural buildings nestled among the trees in the valley below. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches a small peach-colored building and garage on the right, with the rocky cliff drawing closer just before the vehicle passes the structure. Finally, the road bends left, leaving the buildings behind and plunging into a lush green forest with the cliff face still flanking the right side.
